markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Heather Constantine for the Engagement Manager role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Heather's Background:** 15 years in content marketing and account management, including agency work (Hire Visibility) and in-house roles (Rev, Property.com).](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Model:** An AI platform enables high-volume content (5 articles/week/client). The Engagement Manager (EM) role is strategic, focusing on performance and renewals, not editorial work.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [**Relevant Experience:** Successfully managed complex projects (e.g., 3k video transcription for Tony Robbins) and turned around at-risk accounts (e.g., retained 90% of disgruntled clients at Property.com).](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**Client Management Style:** Prefers a hands-on approach, finding a 15–20 account load ideal. Structures work with a 30% communication / 70% backend analysis split.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Model & Engagement Manager Role

  - [**Business Model:** AI platform for high-volume content (5 articles/week/client).](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Current:** Services agency.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Future:** SaaS platform with a services arm.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Team Structure ("Pods"):**](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Engagement Manager (EM):** Client relationship owner, strategy, performance, renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
          - [**Account Load:** 8 accounts → 12 by Q1/Q2 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Content Managers/Editors:** Own end-to-end content production.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Directors:** Pooled support for deep-dive strategy (e.g., SEO audits), accessed via a ticketing system.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [**EM Role Evolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Effective Dec 1:** The role is now purely strategic.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To prevent EMs from getting "too deep into editorial" and becoming reactive.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### Candidate Profile: Heather Constantine

  - [**Experience:** 15 years in content marketing and account management.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Early Career:** Content manager, SEO consultant (SEMrush).](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Agency (Hire Visibility):** Managed 25 accounts (e.g., Burger King, 24-Hour Fitness).](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**In-house (Rev):** Grew book of business from 15 to 55 accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
          - [**Finding:** 15–20 accounts is the "sweet spot" for a hands-on approach.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Consulting (Property.com):** Retained 90% of disgruntled clients after a product pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Key Skills:** Strategic communication, proactive opportunity identification, performance analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Relevant Experience & Problem-Solving

  - [**Tony Robbins Project (Rev):**](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Transcribe \~3,000 videos for upcoming summits.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [**Role:** Account Manager and project lead for a 6-month sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
      - [**Team:** Engineers, video editors, content creators, marketers, human transcribers.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Met all deadlines; client terminated a competitor to work exclusively with Rev.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [**Deliverable Off-Track (Rev):**](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
      - [**Challenge:** A nonprofit campaign failed to resonate due to insufficient client discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
      - [**Action:** Took ownership, used SEMrush and Hotjar for quick wins, and iterated on the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
      - [**Lesson:** Now uses a thorough discovery checklist to prevent recurrence.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

### Client Management Approach

  - [**Communication:** Adapt cadence and channel (e.g., Zoom, Slack) to each client's preference.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Workload Structure:** 30% communication / 70% backend analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**Backend Focus:** Blocked time for performance data analysis, reporting (HubSpot), and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
      - [Discuss interview with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
      - [Contact Heather Constantine with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/oypmWnuGCxMUgx3Bc_EkhqzCDAxoWK7k?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
